languages.text: "С вашего позволения, я не буду передавать эти слова солдатам, Ваша Светлость. На Заркове мы бы ответили блюстителям на такое оскорбление кровью, но здесь иные порядки".

"With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."
languages.original_text: "С вашего позволения, я не буду передавать эти слова солдатам, Ваша Светлость. На Заркове мы бы ответили блюстителям на такое оскорбление кровью, но здесь иные порядки".

traits.locale_text: "With your permission, I'll keep these words from the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

"With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."
"I... I think we'll prove them wrong yet, Lord Captain."

"With your permission, I'll keep these words from the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

"With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

languages.text: 「私…私、まだ間違っているとは証明されないと思います、艦長様。」
languages.original_text: "I... I think we'll prove them wrong yet, Lord Captain."

languages.text: "İzninizle bunu askerlere söylemeyeceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Zarkov'dayken böyle bir hakaretin bedelini infazcılara kanla ödetirdik. Ancak burada kurallar farklı."
languages.original_text: "With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

traits.locale_text: "İzninizle bunu askerlere söylemeyeceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Zarkov'dayken böyle bir hakaretin bedelini infazcılara kanla ödetirdik. Ancak burada kurallar farklı."

languages.text: “若您应允，我不会把这番话转告给士兵，大人。在扎尔科夫，若受此侮辱，我们早就让执法者血债血偿了。可这里的规矩不一样。”
languages.original_text: "With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

traits.locale_text: “若您应允，我不会把这番话转告给士兵，大人。在扎尔科夫，若受此侮辱，我们早就让执法者血债血偿了。可这里的规矩不一样。”

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr erlaubt, werde ich den Soldaten das nicht sagen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Auf Zarkov hätten wir die Enforcer eine derartige Beleidigung mit ihrem Blut bezahlen lassen. Aber hier gelten andere Regeln."
languages.original_text: "With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr erlaubt, werde ich den Soldaten das nicht sagen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Auf Zarkov hätten wir die Enforcer eine derartige Beleidigung mit ihrem Blut bezahlen lassen. Aber hier gelten andere Regeln."

languages.text: « Avec votre accord, Votre Seigneurie, je ne répéterai pas ces mots aux troupes. Sur Zarkov, une telle insulte aurait fait couler le sang à flot. Toutefois, d'autres règles s'appliquent ici. »
languages.original_text: "With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

traits.locale_text: « Avec votre accord, Votre Seigneurie, je ne répéterai pas ces mots aux troupes. Sur Zarkov, une telle insulte aurait fait couler le sang à flot. Toutefois, d'autres règles s'appliquent ici. »

languages.text: «Con su permiso, no se lo diré a los soldados, mi{mf|lord|lady}. En Zarkov, habríamos hecho que los guardias pagaran con sangre un insulto como ese, pero aquí las normas son distintas».
languages.original_text: "With your permission, I will not tell the soldiers that, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Back on Zarkov, we'd have paid the enforcers back in blood for an insult like that. But the rules are different here."

traits.locale_text: «Con su permiso, no se lo diré a los soldados, mi{mf|lord|lady}. En Zarkov, habríamos hecho que los guardias pagaran con sangre un insulto como ese, pero aquí las normas son distintas».
